name: Sakizaya
notes: Sakizaya, a Formosan (Austronesian) language of eastern Taiwan, recognised in 2007 and written in a Latin orthography promulgated by Taiwan's Council of Indigenous Peoples. The grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified: the phoneme inventory is documented (p b t d k ʡ ʔ ts s z h m n ŋ l w j; vowels i u ə o a) but the official letter → phoneme table has not been verified against the published Sakizaya orthography, and guessing it from the sister Formosan conventions would be fabrication. Metadata only, pending the official orthography document.
